raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Insurance companies routinely disregard medical advice and enlist unqualified doctors to deny mental health and substance abuse treatment.",
    "SB 999 will ensure that treatments for substance use disorders align with the standards set by the American Society of Addiction Medicine.",
    "SB 999 guarantees patients the right to quick and proper treatment reviews.",
    "SB 999 prevents decisions based on profit by requiring an explanation for any denied treatment.",
    "Care prescribed by substance use treatment professionals is being denied by reviewers who aren’t trained in substance use care.",
    "SB 999 ensures that decisions about treatment are made by those with the appropriate expertise.",
    "The existing consumer health care laws inadequately protect Californians from untrained reviewers of care coverage for substance use disorders.",
    "SB 999 raises the quality and experience of those reviewing health plan claims to match the providers treating patients."
  ]
}
```
